title: Structure function analysis of chaperone complexes
further_info: Recommended Reading Mayer 2010 Gymnastics of Molecular Chaperones, Molecular Cell, 39, 321-331. Graf et al. 2009 Spatially and kinetically resolved changes in the conformational dynamics of the Hsp90 chaperone machine, EMBO J. 28, 602-613. 6-8 weeks, full day, time to be arranged, INF 345, 1. floor, 10.00 a.m. - 6.00 p.m.
